name: Your Faith Has Made You Well
oracleText: Remove all damage from target creature. You gain life equal to the damage removed. That creature gains lifelink until end of turn.
flavorText: "Thy faith hath made thee whole; go in peace." — Luke 8:48
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Woman with an Issue of Blood" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, The Woman with an Issue of Blood
